revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 20:16:07 on [[Template:Coord missing/CheckCat]]
revision.text:
{{#ifexist: Category:{{{1|}}} articles missing geocoordinate data||[[Category:Articles missing geocoordinate data, with non-existent category]]{{Error|Invalid category parameter for [[Template:Coord missing]].This is usually caused by using a spelling error or by an-over-precise category.
For a full list of categories, see[[:Category:Articles missing geocoordinate data by country]] and its subcategories}} }}

{{#ifexist: Category:{{{1|}}} articles missing geocoordinate data||[[Category:Articles missing geocoordinate data, with non-existent category]]{{Error|"{{{1|}}}" is an invalid category parameter for [[Template:Coord missing]].This is usually caused by using a spelling error or by an-over-precise category.
For a full list of categories, see [[:Category:Articles missing geocoordinate data by country]] and its subcategories}} }}

{{#ifexist: Category:{{{1|}}} articles missing geocoordinate data||[[Category:Articles missing geocoordinate data, with non-existent category]]{{Error|"{{{1|}}}" is an invalid category parameter for [[Template:Coord missing]].
The problem is usually caused either by a spelling mistake or by an-over-precise category.
For a full list of categories, see [[:Category:Articles missing geocoordinate data by country]] and its subcategories.}} }}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
